title: Admissions Open for 2026–27 Session
content: Kids Planet is now accepting applications for the 2026–27 academic session for Playgroup through Class 8. Limited seats available — contact us at +91 94180 23454 or visit the school during office hours (Mon–Sat, 9 AM – 1 PM).

title: Annual Day Featured in Amar Ujala
content: Our Annual Day celebration was covered by Amar Ujala — 'Students Added Colour To The Annual Function.' Students showcased their talents through dance, drama, music, and cultural performances. Thank you to all parents who attended!

title: Holi Holiday Notice
content: School will remain closed on March 14, 2026 on account of Holi. Classes will resume on March 16, 2026. Wishing all families a colorful and joyful Holi!

title: Class 8 Farewell Ceremony
content: A heartfelt farewell was organized for our Class 8 graduates. To our wonderful students — every goodbye brings a chance for a great hello in your next chapter. Go out and write a bestseller. Shine bright like the stars you are!

title: Republic Day Celebrations
content: Republic Day was celebrated with patriotic fervor. Students performed songs, dances, and skits honoring India's constitution. Fancy dress competitions saw students dressed as national leaders and freedom fighters.

title: Winter Break Notice
content: School will remain closed for winter break from December 25, 2025 to January 2, 2026. Classes resume on January 3, 2026. Wishing all families a warm and happy holiday season!

title: Art & Craft Exhibition Success
content: The Kids Planet Art & Craft Exhibition was a grand success! Students showcased handmade crafts, science models, paper lanterns, and creative artwork. Parents and community members attended and appreciated our students' creativity.

title: Sports Day Results
content: Annual Sports Day was a resounding success with 200+ students participating in races, relay, long jump, and team sports. Congratulations to all winners and participants — every child who competed is a champion!
